title: Value Added Tax (Application for Registration) Order, 2004

sections.heading: (1) In this Order, unless the context otherwise requires-- Interpretation
sections.text:
"relevantquarter"meansanyperiodofthreeconsecutivemonths
commencing---
(a) on 1st December, 2002; or
(b) on the first day of any subsequent calendar month; and
" relevant year " means any period of twelve months
commencing---
( a) on 1st December, 2002; or •
(b) on the first day of any subsequent calendar month.

sections.heading: (1) For the purposes of subsection (I) of section twenty-eight Taxable

registration
(2) Where the taxable turnover of a business exceeds or is likely to
exceed-
(a) two hundred million kwacba in any relevant year; or
(b) fifty million kwacba in any relevant quarter;
the business shall be taken to exceed the prescribed turnover for the
purposes of subsection (I) of section twenty-eight oft he Act, and the
person carrying on the business shall be liable to make application to
be registered by the Commissioner-General accordingly.
(3) For the purposes of calculating the turnover of a business that
is attributable to taxable supplies, the supplies made in the course of
